name: Radiant Hearts
description:
The Radiant Hearts may seem like ordinary teenage girls, but they’ve been blessed with magical powers from the goddess of Justice, Justina. The sisters use their powers to carry out justice and punish evil doers whether they be ordinary pickpockets to the evil forces of Malvaria. However, finding the balance between ordinary life and crime fighting is certainly no easy task. What will be your role in their lives?

Authors note: This was a bot I had on the self for a while and there were a certain points where I considered scrapping this character bot all together. But after some tweaking here and there, I found myself feeling satisfied with what I created and now y’all get to enjoy them!

[Portraits and a picture of Brightvale can be found here]
